q1.question: How is Clyde different from ChatGPT or Jasper?
q1.answer: ChatGPT and Jasper are generic tools without memory. You have to supply context with every prompt. Clyde has persistent memory per brand: brand voice, audience, performance history and preferences stay retained. On top of that, Clyde orchestrates 12 specialized skills (social, blogs, voice, ads, SEO, analytics), not just text. One brain with shared memory, not a separate tool per task.

q2.question: What if I want to cancel?
q2.answer: No lock-in. Your data is always exportable within 24 hours (JSON and CSV). Because we run self-hosted infrastructure on EU servers, we do not put a proprietary wrapper around your data. Everything Clyde learns about your brands stays yours. On cancellation you have 30 days for a full export before we decommission your workspaces.

q3.question: Why an application? Why no self-service?
q3.answer: Clyde is a high-touch AI partnership, not a SaaS tool. Every client gets personal onboarding by Daley (founder) and 4 weeks of partnership setup. We accept a maximum of {maxPartners} new agencies per year. The application is not there to reject you: we check together whether it is a match for both sides. A generic sign-up doesn't fit what we deliver.

q4.question: Exactly how many skills do I get?
q4.answer: Twelve in total: 9 live (Social Media, Blog Factory, Ad Creator, Voice Agent, Lead Qualifier, Reporting, SEO/GEO, Research, Clyde orchestrator) and 3 coming soon (Reel Builder, Email Management, ManyChat DM). Availability varies per tier. Partner has 8 skills plus 2 add-on paths. Growth, Professional, Enterprise and Founding have all 12 skills, with caps on the more expensive ones (voice, video, reels).

q5.question: Why does this work better for agencies than separate tools?
q5.answer: Because it is one brain with shared memory, not 12 separate tools. What Clyde learns about brand X in social media, he automatically uses in their blogs and ads. Cross-skill learning is impossible with separate tools: you lose context at every handover. One AI Marketing Employee for your entire portfolio means patterns and data travel between skills.

matrix.legend: Numbers are monthly caps per workspace. "Fair use" = unlimited with throttling on extreme outliers. "Add-on" = available via pack, not included in the base tier.

q1.question: Why caps per skill instead of "everything unlimited"?
q1.answer: Voice, Video Ads and Reel Builder are the most expensive skills in credit usage (5 to 25 credits per action). Unlimited on every tier would lead to astronomical prices, or to fair-use throttling behind the scenes. Caps keep costs predictable and give each tier a natural upgrade trigger.

q2.question: What happens if I go over my credits or caps?
q2.answer: You get a warning at 80% and 100% of your monthly allocation. After that you can choose: wait until next month, buy a credit pack (Partner Top-Up €39 to Max €697), or upgrade to a higher tier. No automatic overage, no surprise on your invoice.

q3.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade between tiers?
q3.answer: Upgrading is possible at any time, prorated. Downgrading takes effect at the next billing cycle. You cannot drop below Founding: your Founding price stays valid for life as long as you remain active.

q4.question: Do I get all 12 skills or a subset?
q4.answer: Partner has 8 skills included plus 2 add-on paths (static ads and ManyChat). Growth, Professional, Enterprise and Founding have all 12 skills, with caps on the more expensive ones. Voice Agent, Video Ads and Reel Builder are not available on Partner: for those you move up to Growth.

q5.question: What is included in the onboarding fee?
q5.answer: The one-time onboarding fee covers 4 weeks of partnership setup by Daley: brand voice intake per brand, KPI definitions, skill configuration, test runs and approval workflow setup. It is not a technical installation fee: it is an investment in a working AI Marketing Employee.

meta.description: Legal information for Future Marketing AI.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.content: These terms of service govern your use of the Future Marketing AI (FutureMarketingAI) platform and the AI Marketing Employee services. By subscribing to or using our services, you agree to these terms. FutureMarketingAI operates as an Agent as a Service (AaaS) provider, delivering persistent AI agents with configurable marketing skills to marketing agencies. Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

service_description.title: 1. Service description
service_description.content: FutureMarketingAI provides an Agent as a Service (AaaS) platform that delivers AI Marketing Employee services with configurable skills. Available skills include: Content Creator (blog articles, social content, newsletters), Voice Agent (inbound and outbound calls, appointment booking), Lead Qualifier (chatbot, lead scoring, routing), Social Media Manager (multi-platform scheduling, engagement tracking), Ad Creator (AI-generated static and video ads) and Reporting & Analytics (cross-platform dashboards, weekly reports, anomaly detection). Skills are activated per subscription tier and can be added or removed at any time.

subscription_terms.title: 2. Subscription terms
subscription_terms.content: Services are offered on a monthly subscription basis across five tiers: Partner (EUR 347/mo), Growth (EUR 2,497/mo), Professional (EUR 4,497/mo), Enterprise (EUR 7,997/mo) and Founding (EUR 997/mo, 10 lifetime spots). All plans include all 12 AI skills, with per-tier caps on voice, video and reels. Usage is measured in credits; each plan includes a monthly credit allocation. Additional credits can be purchased in packs. Billing is monthly in advance. You may cancel your subscription with 30 days written notice, effective at the end of the current billing cycle.

ai_output_disclaimer.title: 3. AI output disclaimer
ai_output_disclaimer.content: All content, recommendations and output generated by your AI Marketing Employee are provided as drafts that require human review before publication or distribution. FutureMarketingAI does not guarantee the accuracy, originality, factual correctness or suitability of AI-generated output for any specific purpose. The subscribing agency is solely responsible for reviewing, editing and approving all AI output before publishing to or on behalf of their clients. AI-generated content should not be relied upon as professional, legal, financial or medical advice.

liability_limitation.title: 4. Limitation of liability
liability_limitation.content: FutureMarketingAI's total aggregate liability arising out of or related to these terms is limited to the total fees paid by the subscriber in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim. FutureMarketingAI is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages, including loss of profits, data, business opportunities or goodwill. AI-generated output does not constitute professional advice of any kind, and FutureMarketingAI accepts no liability for decisions made based on such output.

data_processing.title: 5. Data processing
data_processing.content: FutureMarketingAI processes data on behalf of the subscribing agency in accordance with GDPR Article 28. Detailed processing terms are set out in the Data Processing Agreement, which forms an integral part of these terms. The agency, as data controller, is responsible for ensuring that appropriate legal bases exist for the processing of personal data through the FutureMarketingAI platform. A copy of the Data Processing Agreement is available on request at privacy@future-marketing.ai.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the subscription with 30 days written notice. Upon termination, you have a 30 calendar-day export window, during which you can download all workspace data, content, reports and configurations. After the 30-day export period, all agency data, client workspace data and associated content will be permanently deleted from our systems and sub-processors. FutureMarketingAI may terminate your account immediately for material breach of these terms, including non-payment exceeding 30 days.

governing_law.title: 7. Governing law and disputes
governing_law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Netherlands. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these terms are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Amsterdam. Before initiating legal proceedings, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation for a period of at least 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.content: This privacy policy describes how Future Marketing AI (FutureMarketingAI) collects, uses, stores and protects personal data in connection with our AI Marketing Employee platform. FutureMarketingAI is committed to protecting the privacy of our subscribers, their clients and end users, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Dutch data protection laws. This policy applies to all data processed through our platform and website.

data_collected.title: 1. Data we collect
data_collected.content: We collect the following categories of personal data: Account data (name, email address, company name, billing information), Client workspace data (brand voice documents, social media account connections, content schedules, audience profiles), Usage data (platform activity logs, feature usage, execution counts) and AI interaction data (chat messages with AI agents, voice call transcripts, content generation prompts). We do not intentionally collect special categories of personal data (special categories under GDPR Article 9).

purpose_of_processing.title: 2. Purpose of processing
purpose_of_processing.content: We process personal data for the following purposes: providing AI Marketing Employee services (content creation, voice agent operations, lead qualification, social media management, ad creation, reporting), improving service quality and AI performance through aggregated usage analysis, billing and subscription management, providing technical support and customer service, and complying with legal obligations including tax, accounting and regulatory requirements.

legal_basis.title: 3. Legal basis
legal_basis.content: Our processing of personal data is based on the following legal grounds: performance of a contract (GDPR Article 6(1)(b)) for providing our subscribed services, legitimate interest (GDPR Article 6(1)(f)) for service improvement, security monitoring and fraud prevention, consent (GDPR Article 6(1)(a)) for analytics cookies and optional marketing communications, and legal obligation (GDPR Article 6(1)(c)) for tax and regulatory compliance.

ai_data_processing.title: 4. AI data processing
ai_data_processing.content: Our AI Marketing Employee processes data as follows: the Content Creator skill uses brand voice documents and content briefs to generate marketing content. Only the minimum context needed is sent to AI providers. The Voice Agent skill processes call audio for speech recognition and response generation. Recordings are retained for 90 days for quality assurance. The Lead Qualifier skill analyzes form submissions and chat messages to score and route leads. Lead scoring is advisory; no automated decisions are made. AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) process data under a Zero Data Retention policy, meaning your data is not used to train AI models.

sub_processors.title: 5. Sub-processors
sub_processors.content: We use the following key sub-processors to deliver our services: OpenAI (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Anthropic (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Supabase (database and authentication, EU region, Frankfurt), Vercel (hosting and CDN, EU and global regions) and Vapi (voice agent processing, US). A complete and current list of sub-processors is maintained in our Data Processing Agreement. We notify subscribers at least 30 days in advance of new sub-processors.

data_retention.title: 6. Data retention
data_retention.content: Active accounts: all data is retained for the duration of the service agreement. After termination: a 30-day export window is provided, after which all data is permanently deleted. Voice recordings and chat logs: retained for 90 days after processing for quality assurance and dispute resolution. Platform logs: retained for 90 days. Backups: deleted within 30 days after deletion of source data. Billing records: retained in accordance with Dutch tax law (7 years).

data_subject_rights.title: 7. Your rights
data_subject_rights.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to: access your personal data and receive a copy, rectify inaccurate or incomplete personal data, erase your personal data (right to be forgotten), restrict the processing of your personal data, data portability (receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format), object to processing based on legitimate interest and withdraw consent at any time for consent-based processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@future-marketing.ai. We respond within 30 days as required by the GDPR.

international_transfers.title: 8. International data transfers
international_transfers.content: Some of our sub-processors are located outside the EU/EEA, mainly in the United States. For these transfers we rely on the following safeguards: the EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF) for certified US companies (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel, Stripe) and Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission where DPF certification is not available. Where possible we use EU data center regions to minimize international transfers. We closely follow legal developments around international transfers, including any challenges to the DPF.

contact.title: 9. Contact and supervisory authority
contact.content: Data controller: Future Marketing AI, the Netherlands. For privacy inquiries, data subject requests or complaints: privacy@future-marketing.ai. If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens, AP) at autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl.

meta.title: Memory. Clyde remembers every brand, forever | FutureMarketingAI
meta.description: Clyde remembers each brand separately: brand voice, audience, KPIs and what worked in the past. Strictly isolated per client, sharper every week.

hero.subtitle: This is the difference between an AI tool and an AI Marketing Employee: memory. Clyde remembers your brand voice, audience, goals and what worked before. Every week he knows your brands better.

layers.title: How Clyde remembers
layers.subtitle: Like a good employee, Clyde has four kinds of memory that work together. You do not need to know any of the details: it just works.

hot.name: Today
hot.description: What Clyde is working on right now: the ongoing conversation, today's campaign, content in the approval queue. Instantly at hand.

warm.name: This month
warm.description: Recently approved posts, KPI reports and feedback. So Clyde can compare what worked better this week than last.

cold.name: Archive
cold.description: The full archive: brand guidelines, past campaigns, older reports. Searchable by meaning, not only by keyword.

context.name: Who the brand is
context.description: The core that always travels along: brand voice, audience persona, KPI targets, what is allowed and what is not. Only adjusted when you explicitly ask.

isolation.title: Strictly separated per brand
isolation.body1: Clyde works for multiple clients and multiple brands at the same time without them touching. What he learns about Brand A never ends up with Brand B. No brand voice bleeding over, no data leaking, no examples accidentally crossing over.
isolation.body2: Technically, that is handled with a dedicated memory space per client, strictly separated at the database level (Supabase RLS) and in the search index. In human terms: what belongs to your client stays with your client. On cancellation, your data is exportable within 24 hours and fully deleted after 30 days.

decay.title: Sharper every day, never cluttered
decay.decayBody: Not everything from the past stays equally relevant. Old details slowly lose weight, so Clyde does not get clogged up with data from six months ago. Important patterns stay, noise recedes. Just like with humans.
decay.dreamBody: At night Clyde does what we do in our sleep: he connects the dots, abstracts patterns and writes important insights into his permanent knowledge. You wake up with a smarter AI Marketing Employee than the one you left behind yesterday.

progress.title: Week 1 versus week 12
progress.subtitle: The difference between a generic AI and an AI Marketing Employee that truly knows your brands becomes visible in weeks.
progress.week1Body: "Write a caption for brand X." Clyde follows the brand guidelines, but not yet with perfect nuance. A lot of feedback rounds. You are still busy with corrections and fine-tuning.
progress.week12Body: Clyde knows the small quirks of brand X: which emojis yes and no, which opening line converts, which hashtags perform, which times work. The first version is immediately usable. You review, Clyde executes.

contrast.title: Why this does not work with ChatGPT or Jasper

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT / Claude
chatgpt.body: No memory per brand. Every session starts blank. You have to supply brand voice, audience and context with every prompt. Does not work when you serve 20 brands.

jasper.name: Jasper / Copy.ai
jasper.body: Templates and limited memory. Knows "your brand voice" but not "your entire portfolio of 20 brands". Does not scale with the scope of an agency.

clyde.name: Clyde
clyde.body: Persistent memory per brand, four layers, strictly isolated and consolidated every night. Built for agencies with 10 to 50 brands. Sharper every week, never diluted.
